app_info.name: rbGyanX
app_info.intended_use: Radiobiological Clinical Decision Support System (CDSS) for radiation oncology treatment plan evaluation
app_info.description: DICOM TCP/NTCP engine, UTCP, QUANTEC, physical plan-quality metrics; optional ML and Ask rbGyanX in ADVANCED mode

LKB_LogLogistic.description: Lyman-Kutcher-Burman Log-Logistic model for normal tissue complication probability

Poisson_TCP.description: Poisson TCP model based on clonogen survival

ml_models.description: Machine learning models for enhanced prediction accuracy

shap_explainability.description: SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) for model interpretability

qa_checks.description: Comprehensive quality assurance for model reliability

ai_assistant.name: Ask rbGyanX
ai_assistant.description: Local AI assistant for educational and explanatory purposes

retrospective.description: Retrospective analysis of historical treatment plans

step1.name: DVH Preprocessing
step1.description: Import and preprocess differential/cumulative DVH files

step2.name: Dose Metrics & Plots
step2.description: Calculate dose metrics and generate DVH plots

step3.name: TCP/NTCP Analysis
step3.description: Calculate TCP or NTCP using traditional and ML models

step4.name: Clinical Factors Analysis
step4.description: Analyze clinical factors and their impact on outcomes

step5.name: Quality Assurance
step5.description: Comprehensive QA checks including overfitting inspection

step6.name: TCP-NTCP Integration
step6.description: Integrate TCP and NTCP for therapeutic ratio analysis

dashboard_text.description: Advanced radiobiological analysis platform with TCP/NTCP modeling, machine learning integration, and explainable AI capabilities.
dashboard_text.features_summary: Features: Traditional models (LKB, RS), ML models (ANN, XGBoost), SHAP explainability, QA checks, Project management, AI assistant
dashboard_text.intended_use: This software is intended for research and educational purposes. Clinical decisions should be made by qualified medical professionals.
dashboard_text.disclaimer: This tool provides decision support and should not replace clinical judgment. All results should be reviewed by qualified medical physicists and radiation oncologists.
